programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Torrance, Calif., an alleged fender bender leads to a roadside fight, leaving one driver unconscious; in Baltimore, a reported stolen vehicle fleeing from police crashes into a building causing it to collapse.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A heated argument over a merge in Indiana leads to a collision; in Portland, Ore., an enraged driver barrels through a street parade; in China, a pickup truck reverses into a young boy.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A driver comes to a sudden stop, causing a disastrous situation for a motorcyclist coming from behind; a parking spot dispute leads to a man driving his car into a bakery; rescue crews help a woman whose car is partially submerged in an icy pond.

programme.desc: In Castle Rock, Colo., a school bus driver finds himself in hot water when he comes to a sudden stop and frightens some of his passengers; in Florida, after pulling a driver over for speeding, a sheriff experiences a shocking first in his career.

programme.desc: Gordon visits Sante La Brea, a health food restaurant in Hollywood. But there's nothing glamorous about this eatery as owner Dean faces financial ruin.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Lancashire, love is in the air for Rosie and 'Perfect Dave', newly-weds Melisa and Kyle cook together for the first time, and there's a football revelation on Linda and Gary's night.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien brings the fairground to Liverpool in the form of a strength-testing machine, while Henry Cole restores a child's racing car from a sideshow.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George tackles a cottage conundrum, where the only bathroom is through the only bedroom. And will a couple's plans to turn their loft into a cinema be a horror show.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: The Hardacres
programme.desc: The series finale of the sweeping family saga. The Hardacres set things to right, but an unexpected bombshell lands - will they be able find their way back as a family.

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: We're in Torrevieja with Essex boy Colin, who's determined to live a healthier life. And we meet Alicante-based Lydia, a radio DJ who's busy with her daily show and a shift at a shop.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: In Brighton we meet growers at an allotment who offer their produce to local food banks. The charity Nurture through Nature is staffed by volunteers, for whom gardening is a release.

programme.title: The Pennines with Susan Calman
programme.desc: Susan heads to the beautiful North Pennines and Northumberland: a location many fans have asked her to visit, crossing to Lindisfarne Island then meeting a rescue sheep called Barbara.

programme.title: Does Your Child Have ADHD?
programme.desc: Powerful documentary following three families navigating life with attention deficit hyperactivity disorder, cutting through myths and misconceptions to explore diagnosis, treatment and support.

programme.title: Sam & Ade Go Birding
programme.desc: Keen birdwatcher Samuel West introduces his birding novice mate Adrian Edmondson to our most beautiful birds on a tour blending humour and the beauty of nature, starting in Cornwall.

programme.title: Missed Call
programme.desc: After a new development shocks the community, Sarah realises that Katie's disappearance may be part of something far bigger than anyone believed.

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: At Vauxhall station, one the capital's fare-dodging ultra-hot spots, revenue protection officers set a trap to block rush hour fare dodgers -but their first catch is unrepentant.

programme.title: Forensics: Crash Scene Investigators
programme.desc: A speeding car knocks down an 81-year-old cyclist at a crossing. With news that the victim has died, an investigation turns into a hunt for the deceased's killer.

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack
programme.desc: Documentary series exposing the dangerous situations faced by modern police forces.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
